modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks Spanish as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be several noticeable typos and some redundant repeated information.
raw_text:
short_description_text: FGADCSR shows errors when searching for Document ID.

full_description_text:  
I try to search Document ID on FGADCSR.  
I get two messages.  
One says no records found.  
The other says document is complete but I can't change it.
short_description: FGADCSR shows errors when searching for Document ID.
description:
